summary: Regression testing completed after major backend refactoring. Extracted modules (models.py, database.py, auth_utils.py, routes/clientes.py, routes/references.py) are working correctly. All 27 tests passed covering auth, clients CRUD, FS list, reference tokens, notifications, time entries, services, and PCs.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactoring is well-structured: models.py (625 lines), database.py (15 lines), auth_utils.py (52 lines), routes/clientes.py (271 lines), routes/references.py (244 lines)
server.py reduced from 12,975 to 11,771 lines (1,204 lines extracted)
All extracted modules properly import from each other (database.py, auth_utils.py, models.py)
Router prefixes correctly configured: clientes has /clientes prefix, references has no prefix (paths like /referencia/{token})
Both routers included in api_router which has /api prefix, so full paths are /api/clientes/* and /api/referencia/*
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_* clients during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend refactoring regression tests complete. All major endpoints verified working: POST /api/auth/login, GET /api/clientes (CRUD), GET /api/relatorios-tecnicos, GET /api/admin/reference-tokens, GET/POST /api/referencia/{token}, GET /api/notifications, GET /api/time-entries/today, GET /api/services, GET /api/pedidos-cotacao. Extracted modules: models.py (Pydantic models), database.py (MongoDB singleton), auth_utils.py (auth helpers), routes/clientes.py (client CRUD), routes/references.py (internal reference system).

tests: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user info with valid token
GET /api/clientes - Returns list of active clients
GET /api/admin/reference-tokens - Returns list of reference tokens
GET /api/users - Returns list of users (admin only)
